title_cn: 非洲疾病预防控制中心呼吁提供更多埃博拉资金
summary: As Ebola cases rise in the Democratic Republic of Congo and Uganda, Africa CDC's Director General Jean Kaseya says more funding from Western governments is needed to contain the outbreak. Kaseya warns that closing borders won't stop the virus from spreading. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Aid Groups Flock to Venezuela In Search-and-Rescue Frenzy
title_cn: 援助团体涌向委内瑞拉疯狂搜救
summary: Two of the US military ships used in a blockade meant to pressure Nicolás Maduro have headed back toward Venezuela, this time with rescue teams, equipment and medical aid after devastating twin earthquakes struck the country this week.

title: Bolivia Moves to Flexible Exchange-Rate System After 15 Years
title_cn: 玻利维亚 15 年后转向灵活汇率制度
summary: Bolivia is moving to a flexible exchange-rate system to strengthen macroeconomic stability, its Finance Ministry announced Friday.

title: Wall Street Week | USMCA: Can North America’s Trade Deal Survive?
title_cn: 华尔街周刊 | USMCA：北美贸易协议能否生存？
summary: This week, a special edition of Wall Street Week on the USMCA trade deal. The renegotiations are testing the future of an auto industry built on decades of cross-border integration. And, American farmers increasingly depend on exports to Canada and Mexico as other overseas markets become more difficult to access. Plus, years of infrastructure investment have created an energy market that crosses borders more easily than political narratives suggest. Later, can three countries with different priorities still agree on a common economic vision? (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Earn Your Leisure Co-Founders on Financial Literacy
title_cn: 赢得休闲联合创始人的金融素养
summary:
The CEOs and co-founders of Earn Your Leisure, Rashad Bilal and Troy Millings, explain their educational platform that looks to help individuals gain 
 financial freedom and generational wealth. They discuss how to ride the tech stock wave with Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on Bloomberg's "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tennis Pro Caroline Wozniacki on Wimbledon
title_cn: 网球职业选手卡罗琳·沃兹尼亚奇在温布尔登网球公开赛
summary: Tennis champion Caroline Wozniacki sat down with Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on the sidelines of The Wimbledon Court in Central Park. She discusses the future of the sport, player compensation, and advice for her fellow tennis star Serena Williams re-entering competition.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Invesco’s Kriskey: Oil Price Freefall Is ‘Overdone'
title_cn: 景顺的克里斯基：油价自由落体“过度”
summary: Kathy Kriskey, Invesco's Alterative ETF Strategy Head, helps make sense of oil's drop as ships continue to cross through the Strait of Hormuz despite attacks.  She speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title_cn: 据称 Biolife 已引起 Repligen 的收购兴趣
summary: Biolife Solutions Inc. has attracted takeover interest from parties including diagnostics company Repligen Corp., according to people with knowledge of the matter.

title: Magnolia Oil & Gas Is in Lead to Acquire WildFire for Over $4 Billion
title_cn: 厚朴油和Gas有望以超过40亿美元收购WildFire
summary: Magnolia Oil & Gas Corp. has emerged as the front-runner to acquire closely held WildFire Energy for more than $4 billion in what would rank as its largest-ever acquisition, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Dow Jones Finishes Day Down; Week Up | Closing Bell
title_cn: 道琼斯收盘下跌；一周 |结束钟声
summary: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Romaine Bostick, Katie Greifeld, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Coffee Company Kahawa 1893 Works to Empower Women Farmers
title_cn: 咖啡公司 Kahawa 1893 致力于为女性农民赋权
summary: Margaret Nyambumo, founder of coffee company Kahawa 1893 and third-generation coffee farmer, said that she created the option to directly tip the female farmers who grow her coffee beans because she wanted to find a way to consistently and fairly compensate them regardless of fluctuation in coffee prices. Nyambumo said that the tips from customers — which are matched by the company — have been used by one of the farming collectives to start a scholarship for young girls to stay in school.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Education 'Getting Act Together' on Personal Finance: Cohen
title_cn: 个人理财教育“共同行动”：科恩
summary: Abby Joseph Cohen, professor at Columbia Business School, joins Lisa Mateo and Tom Keene on "Bloomberg Money." They discuss personal finance and the US education system's effort to educate students on financial literacy. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Alternative Soda Brands Taking Over Beverage Markets
title_cn: 替代汽水品牌占领饮料市场
summary: Poppi Co-Founder Allison Ellsworth describes struggles of breaking into beverage industry, warns getting product on shelves is "capital intensive." Ellsworth says movement within "MAHA" is changing industry standards, including for beverage giants like Pepsi which purchased Poppi in 2025 for nearly $2 Billion. (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: Barry sits down with Carl Richards author of "Your Money: Reimagining Wealth in Simple Sketches ". They discuss Carl's unlikely start in finance and building his own firm. summary: Gold extended gains above $4,000 an ounce on Friday after the latest US inflation print tempered expectations for an interest-rate hike, capping a tumultuous week that saw bullion slump to the lowest price since November.

title: キオクシア米上場計画、高市政権「370兆円投資」、投資のプロ4人が明かす1000万円投資術──1週間のニュース5選

summary:
Tom Keene and Lisa Mateo discuses the must-read books about Alan Greenspan's legacy on this weeks edition of "Bloomberg Money." Former Fed Chair Alan Greenspan died this week at the age of 100.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title_cn: 苹果寻求美国批准从列入黑名单的CXMT购买芯片：FT
summary: Apple Inc. is pressing the White House for approval to purchase memory chips from a blacklisted Chinese company as it grapples to rein in chip costs, the Financial Times reported on Saturday.

title: China’s Industrial Profit Gains Dip in Sign of Weakness
title_cn: 中国工业利润增幅出现疲软迹象
summary: The increase in China’s industrial profits softened for the first time since November, suggesting that strong exports and price gains failed to offset the drag from tepid domestic demand.

title: Trustpilot Teams Up With Shopify to Connect Reviews to Stores
title_cn: Trustpilot 与 Shopify 合作将评论与商店联系起来
summary: Trustpilot Group Plc partnered with e-commerce giant Shopify Inc. to allow merchants to showcase and manage Trustpilot reviews directly on their online stores.

title: Anthropic’s Mythos 5 AI Model Cleared by US for Wider Use
title_cn: Anthropic 的 Mythos 5 人工智能模型获得美国批准以供更广泛使用
summary: Anthropic PBC won US approval to restore some access to its powerful Mythos 5 artificial intelligence model, after resolving Trump administration concerns about the technology’s potential threats to national security.

title: AI Is Already Reshaping US Politics at Every Level
title_cn: 人工智能已经在各个层面重塑美国政治
summary: From data center backlash to boundless cash from tech billionaires and concerns about deepfaked campaign ads, AI is everywhere in the 2026 US elections.

title: S&P 500 Halts Four-Day Drop To End Jittery Week | The Close 6/26/2026
title_cn: 标准普尔 500 指数停止四天下跌，结束紧张不安的一周收盘价 2026 年 6 月 26 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Sony Pictures Entertainment Motion Picture Group Chairman & CEO, Tom Rothman;  Former Pro Tennis Player, Caroline Wozniacki;   Earn Your Leisure Co-Founders and CEOs, Rashad Bilal & Troy Millings;  Forum AI Co-Founder & CEO, Campbell Brown;  RockCreek Founder & CEO, Afsaneh Beschloss;   Invesco Alterative ETF Strategy Head, Kathy Kriskey;  Franklin Templeton Head of Global Index Portfolio MGMT, Dina Ting;  and Morningstar Research Senior Equity Analyst, David Swartz (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Forum AI CEO on Pitfalls With AI in Politics
title_cn: 论坛人工智能首席执行官谈人工智能在政治中的陷阱
summary: Campbell Brown, Co-Founder and CEO of Forum AI, discusses the need for AI companies to open up for scrutiny. She discusses with Romaine Bostick on Bloomberg's "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sony Pictures’ Tom Rothman: Summer Box Office Is Roaring
title_cn: 索尼影业的汤姆·罗斯曼：夏季票房飙升
summary: Tom Rothman, Chairman and CEO of Sony Pictures Entertainment Motion Pictures Group, discusses the future of Hollywood and how studios can create cultural pressure to keep theater seats filled. He joins Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on set.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX, Charter Discussed Mobile Phone Partnership in US
title_cn: SpaceX 与 Charter 讨论了在美国的手机合作伙伴关系
summary: SpaceX and Charter Communications Inc. have held executive-level talks about partnering on a consumer mobile phone offering, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Anthropic Moves Toward Deal With US to Lift Curbs on AI Models
title_cn: Anthropic 正与美国达成协议，取消对人工智能模型的限制
summary: Anthropic PBC and the Trump administration are moving closer to an agreement that would lift US restrictions on the company’s top two artificial intelligence models after weeks of talks between the two sides over security of the systems, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: OpenAI Limits Release of New Model Under Pressure From US
title_cn: OpenAI 迫于美国压力限制新模型发布
summary: OpenAI is rolling out a preview version of a more capable new artificial intelligence model to select partners before making it available more widely in the coming weeks, following pressure from the Trump administration to stagger the release.

title: Unremarkable Economy, Remarkable Rally: Skelly
title_cn: 经济平淡，反弹引人注目：斯凯利
summary: Dan Skelly, managing director and head of the equity model portfolio team at Morgan Stanley Wealth Management, joins Lisa Mateo and Tom Keene on "Bloomberg Money." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Chip Stocks Plunge as AI Selloff Ripples Across From Asia
title_cn: 人工智能抛售席卷亚洲，美国芯片股暴跌
summary: A global selloff in the shares of chipmakers dragged US indexes sharply lower amid doubts about the sustainability of the AI-fueled tech rally. Katherine Kostereva, CEO, Creatio joined Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gen-Z Traders Go for Broke In American Dream Pursuit
title_cn: Z世代交易者在追求美国梦的过程中陷入破碎
summary: Bloomberg's Justina Lee joins Lisa Mateo and Tom Keene on "Bloomberg Money." The share of stock volumes of retail investors has doubled over the past 15 years, Bloomberg Intelligence estimates. Social media and the gamification of trading have played a decisive role in the growth of investing in crypto, options, sports betting, and prediction markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Trade’s Bruising Week Forces Investors to Be More Selective
title_cn: AI Trade 的惨痛一周迫使投资者更加挑剔
summary: Adam Dell, founder and CEO at Domain Money joined Bloomberg Businessweek Daily to discuss the intersection of fintech, VC, and early stage startup mechanics and building a tech business.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: An Analyst’s Missed Remark Surfaced in Deadly Iran School Strike Probe
title_cn: 伊朗学校罢工事件调查中，一名分析师遗漏的言论浮出水面
summary: An intelligence analyst’s missed remarks are among the missteps surfaced in an investigation into a deadly strike against an elementary school in Iran.

title: Apple’s Vision Pro and Smart Glasses Chief to Join OpenAI
title_cn: 苹果 Vision Pro 和智能眼镜主管将加入 OpenAI
summary: Apple Inc.’s top executive in charge of the Vision Pro headset and the company’s smart glasses efforts is leaving for OpenAI, continuing a streak of high-profile defections to rivals in the artificial intelligence and hardware sectors.

title: Beyond Chips, IMF Sees AI Wealth Boom Adding to Inflation Risks
title_cn: 除了芯片之外，国际货币基金组织还认为人工智能财富繁荣会增加通胀风险
summary: Artificial intelligence may fuel inflation not just by driving up the cost of chips, but also by making consumers wealthier and more willing to spend, according to the International Monetary Fund’s chief economist.

title: Trump Vows 100% Tariff on Europe Over Digital Services Taxes
title_cn: 特朗普誓言对欧洲征收 100% 数字服务税
summary: President Donald Trump threatened to impose 100% tariffs on goods imported from countries that impose digital services taxes, escalating pressure on European nations that just ratified a trade pact with the US.

title: Consumer is Feeling 'A Lot of Pressure' But Bed Bath & Beyond Sees Upside
title_cn: 消费者感到“很大的压力”，但 Bed Bath & Beyond 看到了好处
summary: Amy Sullivan, CEO of Bed Bath & Beyond, said that consumers are feeling 'a lot of pressure' but that company's outlook is that if they can do business at a low point there is a high upside to come. Sullivan also talked about Bed Bath & Beyond's efforts to engage with consumers, including a new sweepstakes around the company's iconic coupons.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Uber Tightens US Driver Background Checks as Sexual Assault Cases Mount
title_cn: 随着性侵犯案件的增加，优步加强了美国司机的背景调查
summary: Uber Technologies Inc. is tightening driver background checks in the US and applying the new standards retroactively to existing workers, the company’s latest response to a wave of sexual-assault lawsuits brought by passengers.

title: iPhone Price Hikes Will Come, Says IDC
title_cn: IDC 表示 iPhone 价格将会上涨
summary: Apple announced price hikes across its hardware products, citing unprecedented price gains in memory chips. Missing from that price hike list, for now, is the iPhone. Nabila Popal, Senior Research Director at IDC, joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: What Is AI Distillation and Why Is It a Worry for the Industry?
title_cn: 什么是AI蒸馏？为什么它会引起业界的担忧？
summary: Artificial intelligence companies in the US have spent hundreds of billions of dollars to develop more advanced chatbots, betting they can earn enough from customers to justify the investment. That approach carries the risk of being undermined by rivals who build competing AI systems for far less.

title: OpenAI Weighs IPO in 2027 | Bloomberg Tech 6/26/2026
title_cn: OpenAI 考虑在 2027 年进行 IPO |彭博科技 2026 年 6 月 26 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow breaks down OpenAI's decision to potentially hold off on an IPO until next year - sending shares of SoftBank falling. Plus, global tech stocks drop after Apple hikes hardware price due to a memory crunch, and SpaceX's $25 billion bond sale is off to a rocky start. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BlackBerry CEO Says Safety Software Offers AI-Resistant Growth
title_cn: 黑莓首席执行官表示安全软件可实现抗人工智能增长
summary: BlackBerry Ltd. Chief Executive Officer John Giamatteo had a direct answer when asked about one of the biggest challenges to software providers: Artificial intelligence isn’t ready to displace his safety-certified products.

title: Cost of the AI Boom: Anxiety, Longer Hours
title_cn: 人工智能繁荣的成本：焦虑、更长的工作时间
summary: One of the promises of AI was alleviating the burdens of work, but the workaholic culture in Silicon Valley hasn't disappeared. Bloomberg's Natasha Mascarenhas explains why round-the-clock managing of AI agents and intense competition are driving longer hours and heightened anxiety for tech workers. She joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" (Source: Bloomberg)

title: European Stocks Fall on Renewed Tech Woes; Zalando Declines
title_cn: 欧洲股市因新一轮科技困境而下跌；扎兰多衰落
summary: European shares fell from record levels amid shifting sentiment toward artificial intelligence and technology stocks.

title: How Geothermal Energy Could Power the AI Boom
title_cn: 地热能如何推动人工智能的繁荣
summary: Can geothermal energy solve the AI energy crunch? I-Pulse Co-Founder, Chairman and CEO Robert Friedland explains how a $250 million US investment will accelerate breakthrough semiconductor technology designed to drill deep into Earth's heat, delivering around-the-clock clean energy. He joins Bloomberg Open Interest to make a  case for government-backed industrial policy and why geothermal, and not wind or solar, is the future of America's energy infrastructure. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Cost Reality Check Hits Asia Tech Stocks as Apple Hikes Prices
title_cn: 随着苹果公司提高价格，人工智能成本现实检查冲击亚洲科技股
summary:
Asian technology stocks slumped after Apple Inc. and Microsoft Corp. raised prices for their products, stoking concern that rising component costs will curb demand for devices and eventually slow the memory chip rally that has powered much of the AI trade.
Bloomberg Tech Host Ed Ludlow discusses the move from Apple to raise prices as well as what's next for OpenAI as they mull a delay for the company's IPO. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Elroy Air’s Cargo Drone Bet
title_cn: Elroy Air 的货运无人机赌注
summary: Elroy Air is going public at a roughly $1 billion valuation, aiming to replace delivery trucks with long-range cargo drones. CEO Andrew Clare joins Bloomberg Open Interest to explain how the company’s heavy-payload aircraft works, why public markets are the right funding path and why defense demand and US supply-chain automation make this the ideal moment to scale. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bahrain Targeted, Ship Struck as Iran War Ceasefire Tested
title_cn: 巴林成为目标，船只被击中，伊朗战争停火经受考验
summary: Bahrain said it had been targeted by Iran and a ship in the Strait of Hormuz was struck on Saturday afternoon as Tehran and Washington traded accusations that the other had violated the ceasefire.

title: Ship Struck in Hormuz as Naval Authorities Raise Threat Level
title_cn: 海军当局提高威胁级别，船舶在霍尔木兹遇难
summary: Another ship was struck by a projectile in the Strait of Hormuz and naval authorities increased the threat level to shipping, following US strikes on Iran that were a retaliation for an attack on a cargo ship earlier in the week.

title: Ukraine Hits Volgograd Military Plant With Flamingo Missiles
title_cn: 乌克兰用火烈鸟导弹袭击伏尔加格勒军事工厂
summary: Ukraine said it used Flamingo missiles to attack a military plant in Russia’s Volgograd overnight, causing fires at the facility, according to President Volodymyr Zelenskyy.

title: Israel, Lebanon Reach Framework Deal Aiming to End Conflict
title_cn: 以色列和黎巴嫩达成旨在结束冲突的框架协议
summary: Israel, Lebanon and the US reached an initial trilateral framework agreement aimed at paving the way for ending the conflict between the two countries and ultimately reaching a peace settlement, a senior Israeli official said Friday.

title: Trump Visit to India in 2027 in the Works, Rubio Tells IANS
title_cn: 卢比奥告诉 IANS，特朗普将于 2027 年访问印度
summary: The US is working toward a visit by President Donald Trump to India early next year while aiming to finalize a bilateral trade deal in the coming weeks or months, Secretary of State Marco Rubio told IANS.

title: Burnham to Reveal Devolution Push in First Speech, Times Reports
title_cn: 据《泰晤士报》报道，伯纳姆将在第一次演讲中透露权力下放的推动力
summary: Andy Burnham is expected to unveil a raft of plans focusing on devolving powers and money from central government to England’s regions in his first major policy speech since announcing he would stand for leadership of the Labour party.

title: Putin’s Glide Bombs Are Turning Ukraine’s Fortress City Into Rubble
title_cn: 普京的滑翔炸弹正在将乌克兰的要塞城市变成废墟
summary: The off-duty soldiers were in a coffee shop near to Peace Square in Kramatorsk when a Russian glide bomb struck nearby.

title: South African Freight Firms Brace for Mass Anti-Migrant Protests
title_cn: 南非货运公司准备迎接大规模反移民抗议
summary: South African freight operators are delaying deliveries, mapping alternative routes and weighing additional security before anti-migrant demonstrations scheduled for June 30, as they seek to shield workers and cargo from possible disruptions along some of the busiest transport corridors.

title: Days Ahead to Show If Burnham Plays Politics Better Than Starmer
title_cn: 未来几天将显示伯纳姆是否比斯塔默更好地玩政治
summary: Standing across from Keir Starmer in the Commons chamber this week, opposition leader Kemi Badenoch drew on a particularly violent metaphor for how the Labour Party had ditched him when she conjured up an image of “400 knives stuck in the prime minister’s back.”

title: Trump’s Troop Withdrawal Leaves Germany’s Base Towns in Limbo
title_cn: 特朗普的撤军让德国的基地城镇陷入困境
summary: Threatened shifts in US defense spending in Europe mean risk and opportunity for affected communities.

title: US Strikes Iran in Response to Drone Attack in Strait of Hormuz
title_cn: 美国打击伊朗以回应霍尔木兹海峡的无人机袭击
summary: The US attacked Iran one day after Tehran struck a commercial ship in the Strait of Hormuz, an exchange that threatened to break the fragile ceasefire between the two countries.

title: US Conducts Strikes Against Iran in Response to Thursday Attacks | Balance of Power: Late Edition
title_cn: 美国针对周四袭击事件对伊朗进行打击权力平衡：后期版
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Ambassador Julianne Smith says US strikes on Iran, which CENTCOM says came in response to an Iranian attack on a cargo ship in the Strait of Hormuz, could "spiral into something bigger," Glenn Ivey, Democratic Representative of Maryland, says the US should focus on entrenching a cease-fire and moving toward a longer-term peace deal, and Gregory Allen, Decision Tree Research Founder and CEO, discusses Open AI's latest model and says the government's rollout rules are 'opaque.' (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Allen: Government AI rollout rules are ‘completely opaque’
title_cn: 艾伦：政府人工智能推出规则“完全不透明”
summary: Gregory Allen says OpenAI is responding reasonably to the Trump administration's push to sequence access to advanced AI cybersecurity models, but says he would not call the process voluntary given the threat of export controls. Allen, founder and CEO of Decision Tree Research, says those who need to be defended, including banks, the US military and intelligence agencies need access first, but warns the process by which the public will gain access remains "completely opaque." He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on Bloomberg's Balance of Power. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Venezuela Quake Crisis Tests Legitimacy of Rodriguez Regime
title_cn: 委内瑞拉地震危机考验罗德里格斯政权的合法性
summary: The earthquakes that struck Venezuela Wednesday have become the first major political test for acting President Delcy Rodríguez, with the disaster quickly evolving into a contest over competence.

title: Rep. Ivey: US Must Move Toward Peace With Iran
title_cn: 众议员艾维：美国必须与伊朗实现和平
summary: Representative Glenn Ivey says he generally supports President Trump's ability to retaliate after violent attacks by Iran, while stressing he has not yet been briefed on CENTCOM's account of a Tehran-orchestrated drone strike on a vessel in the Strait of Hormuz. Rep. Ivey, a Maryland Democrat, says the US should focus on entrenching a cease-fire and moving toward a longer-term peace deal, but warns the Trump administration may not be able to secure an Iran agreement "even as good as" the Obama-era deal. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on Bloomberg's Balance of Power.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Smith Warns US-Iran Strikes Could "Spiral"
title_cn: 史密斯警告美伊袭击可能“螺旋式上升”
summary: Ambassador Julianne Smith says US strikes on Iran, which CENTCOM says came in response to an Iranian attack on a cargo ship in the Strait of Hormuz, could "spiral into something bigger," but says the US and Iran have reason to preserve the ceasefire. Smith, former US Ambassador to NATO under President Biden, says companies may hold back shipments as they wait to see whether Iran responds. She speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on Bloomberg's Balance of Power. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: “Soft Power Suicide”: Samantha Power On One Year Without USAID
title_cn: “软实力自杀”：萨曼莎在没有美国国际开发署的情况下继续执政一年
summary: Nearly a year after the Trump administration shuttered USAID, its former leader Samantha Power sits down with David Gura on the Big Take Podcast to discuss the impact of those cuts — and what she wishes she had done differently.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bloomberg Businessweek Daily Live From Uncharted Summit | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 6/26/2026
title_cn: 《彭博商业周刊》神秘海域峰会每日直播 |彭博商业周刊日报 6/26/2026
summary: Bloomberg Businessweek Daily is live from the Uncharted Summit in Southampton. Today, Alli McCartney, private wealth advisor and managing director of wealth management at UBS Alignment Partners, breaks down how wealthy clients are looking at the investment market.  Then, Jeff Perry, chief revenue officer at Carta, discusses investing in growing AI infrastructure. Plus, Adam Dell, founder and CEO at Domain Money, talks how his clients are viewing crypto investments as bitcoin remains down. Then, Allison Ellsworth, co-founder of alternative soda brand Poppi, discusses what consumers are looking for in the beverage market as customers look for alternatives to traditional alcohol and soda. Finally, Alan Hawley, chief revenue officer at Sentient Jet, talks the travel bump from the World Cup. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Appeals Court Rejects Trump EPA Bid to Roll Back Soot Pollution Limit
title_cn: 美国上诉法院驳回特朗普环保局降低烟尘污染限制的提议
summary: In a blow to the Trump administration’s deregulatory agenda, a federal appeals court on Friday rejected the Environmental Protection Agency’s attempt to roll back soot pollution standards set in 2024.

title: NATO Chief Upbeat But Trump’s Doubts Likely Won’t Go Away
title_cn: 北约主席乐观，但特朗普的疑虑可能不会消失
summary: Rutte said he’s positive about alliance future after talks with Trump, a longtime skeptic

title: Trump on Iran Ceasefire Violation: 'You'll Find Out'
title_cn: 特朗普谈伊朗违反停火协议：“你会发现的”
summary: US President Donald Trump accused Iran of violating their ceasefire agreement by firing at cargo ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz during remarks with reports in the Oval Office. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oman Tells Allies Ships Going Through Hormuz May Have to Pay
title_cn: 阿曼告诉盟国，经过霍尔木兹海峡的船只可能必须付出代价
summary: Oman has told European officials there’s no way of going back to the pre-war status quo with the Strait of Hormuz and transiting ships may have to be charged some fees, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Trump Says Iran Violated Ceasefire | Balance of Power 6/26/2026
title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗违反停火协议权力平衡 6/26/2026
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss the latest from the Trump Administration. On today's show, Democratic Congresswoman Madeleine Dean of Pennsylvania, Stonecourt Capital Partner Rick Davis, Harvard Kennedy School Ash Center Visiting Democracy Fellow Jeanne Sheehan Zaino and Constitutional lawyer Robert McWhirter. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Samantha Power on USAID and Trump’s ‘Soft Power Suicide’
title_cn: 萨曼莎·鲍尔谈美国国际开发署和特朗普的“软实力自杀”
summary: Nearly a year after the Trump administration shuttered USAID, its former administrator, Samantha Power, sits down with David Gura and the Big Take podcast to discuss the impact of those cuts — and what she wishes she had done differently. (Source: Bloomberg)
